hero.title: Discover Authentic Fijian Adventures
hero.subtitle: Explore Vanua Levu's hidden treasures — from misty mountain treks to crystal lagoon snorkeling.

homepage.featured_subtitle: Handpicked adventures that define the spirit of Vanua Levu.

booking.title: Booking Portal
booking.subtitle: Enter your details and organize your itinerary.
booking.select_operator_desc: Choose an operator to view their exclusive activities.
booking.origin_desc: Your transit transfer to your first operator will originate from here.
booking.whatsapp_desc: Get booking confirmations, 24-hour reminders, and post-trip review requests via WhatsApp.

basket.title: Basket
basket.empty_hint: Select an adventure to build your itinerary.

explore.title: Explore Adventures
explore.subtitle: Search, filter, and discover authentic Fijian experiences.
explore.no_results_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters.

review.title: Share Your Experience
review.subtitle: Your feedback helps other travellers and supports our local communities.
review.review_text_placeholder: Tell us about your adventure... What did you love? What made it special?
review.success_message: Your review has been submitted for approval.

common.auth_message: You must be signed into your Vualiku XP account.

footer.tagline: Community-led eco-tourism platform for Vanua Levu, Fiji.
